list.name: factory
list.label: Factory
list.definition: SELECT name AS "__text", code AS "__value" FROM factories WHERE "isActive" = true ORDER BY name
list.query: SELECT name AS "__text", code AS "__value" FROM factories WHERE "isActive" = true ORDER BY name

list.name: area
list.label: Area
list.definition: SELECT a.name AS "__text", a.id AS "__value" FROM areas a JOIN factories f ON f.id = a."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY a.name
list.query: SELECT a.name AS "__text", a.id AS "__value" FROM areas a JOIN factories f ON f.id = a."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY a.name

list.name: line
list.label: Production Line
list.definition: SELECT l.name AS "__text", l.id AS "__value" FROM production_lines l JOIN factories f ON f.id = l."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY l.name
list.query: SELECT l.name AS "__text", l.id AS "__value" FROM production_lines l JOIN factories f ON f.id = l."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY l.name

list.name: machine
list.label: Machine
list.definition: SELECT m.name AS "__text", m.id AS "__value" FROM machines m JOIN factories f ON f.id = m."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY m.name
list.query: SELECT m.name AS "__text", m.id AS "__value" FROM machines m JOIN factories f ON f.id = m."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY m.name

list.name: shift
list.label: Shift
list.definition: SELECT s.name AS "__text", s.id AS "__value" FROM shift_templates s JOIN factories f ON f.id = s."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY s.name
list.query: SELECT s.name AS "__text", s.id AS "__value" FROM shift_templates s JOIN factories f ON f.id = s."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY s.name

list.name: product
list.label: Product
list.definition: SELECT k.name AS "__text", k.id AS "__value" FROM skus k JOIN factories f ON f.id = k."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY k.name
list.query: SELECT k.name AS "__text", k.id AS "__value" FROM skus k JOIN factories f ON f.id = k."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY k.name

list.name: batch
list.label: Batch
list.definition: SELECT b."batchNumber" AS "__text", b.id AS "__value" FROM batch_records b JOIN factories f ON f.id = b."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY b."startTime" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 500
list.query: SELECT b."batchNumber" AS "__text", b.id AS "__value" FROM batch_records b JOIN factories f ON f.id = b."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY b."startTime" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 500

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(t.value),0)::numeric,1) AS value FROM energy_readings t JOIN energy_meters em ON em.id=t."meterId" JOIN factories f ON f.id=t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."timestamp") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND em.type='COMPRESSED_AIR'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM energy_meters t JOIN factories f ON f.id = t."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND t.type='COMPRESSED_AIR'

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(t."timestamp",$__interval), SUM(t.value) AS "Compressed Air" FROM energy_readings t JOIN energy_meters em ON em.id=t."meterId" JOIN factories f ON f.id=t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."timestamp") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND em.type='COMPRESSED_AIR' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
